<h1 align="center" tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Welcome!
      <span class="AnimatedImagePlayer" data-target="animated-image.player" hidden="">
        <a data-target="animated-image.replacedLink" class="AnimatedImagePlayer-images" href="https://private-user-images.githubusercontent.com/50671740/340380773-85971301-deec-4633-a055-ed1eb63f63cc.gif?jwt=eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..8RncXjV3IwGM_aXPbj_d879uVxvRuqYbA8cryFM0zzg" target="_blank"></a></span></h1>
<h4 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">NGNW.pl – a network of CS2, CS:GO and CS 1.6 servers, the plans for which date back to 2021 and were gradually brought to fruition until the project finally saw the light of day. We stand out from other networks thanks to our unique forum style, constantly developed and refined servers, and an atmosphere that will keep you coming back. If you’re looking for stability, a good time and enjoy taking part in numerous competitions, then NGNW.pl is the place for you.</h4>
<hr>
<h1 align="left" tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Links to NGNW.pl</h1>
